fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item for which the cycle counting can be performed.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location where the cycle counting is performed.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: Phys Invt Counting Period Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the counting period that indicates how often you want to count the item or stockkeeping unit in a physical inventory.

fields.name: Last Counting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date when the counting period for the item or stockkeeping unit was updated.

fields.name: Count Frequency per Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of times you want the item or stockkeeping unit to be counted each year.

fields.name: Phys Invt Counting Period Type
fields.tooltip: Indicates whether the physical inventory counting period used on the line is assigned to the stockkeeping unit (SKU) or to the item.

fields.name: Next Counting Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the next counting period.

fields.name: Next Counting End Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the next counting period.
